content: I'll help you browse the NOAA NAM archive to identify available recent dates and model runs. Let me start by checking what research already exists and then browse the archive.

args.description: Check for existing NAM URL research

args.command: timeout 30 curl -s "https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/nam/prod/" 2>&1 || echo "Request timed out or failed"

content: Let me try a different approach - let's check if there's a different archive URL and also use the phone as a failover:

output:
Not Found

The requested URL was not found on this server.

args.command: adb shell am start -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d 'https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/nam/prod/' com.android.chrome
args.description: Open NAM archive in Chrome on phone

args.command: sleep 5 && adb shell screencap -p > /tmp/nam_archive.png && echo "Screenshot captured"
args.description: Wait for page load and capture screenshot
